productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Brown Striped Shirt
description: Style Note Spring's office trends are light, summery and coloured with pastel shades. mark taylor considers a fun yet masculine take on classic formal staples. This simple shirt hits all the corporate formal rules right and demands to be layered with a stylish trench coat and a slim tie. Style this with denims for a semi-formal vibe or pair it with chinos for a ready-to-work look. Product Details Brown shirt with white stripes, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Material and Care Blended Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub, bleach or iron directly on print/embroidery Drip dry Warm iron Size and Fit Slim Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40   Style NoteSpring's office trends are light, summery and coloured with pastel shades.
